hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
if [ -f "/usr/local/docker-config/setProxy.sh" ]; then . /usr/local/docker-config/setProxy.sh fi
GIT_BRANCH_SHORT=`echo ${GIT_BRANCH} | cut -d "/" -f 2` GIT_COMMIT_SHORT=`echo ${GIT_COMMIT} | cut -c1-7`
docker run --rm \ -v "$DOCKER_CONFIG_DIR/jenkins_home/workspace/$JOB_NAME/:/app" \ -v maven_m2_cache:/root/.m2 \ -w /app \ --platform=linux/amd64 \ maven:3.9-eclipse-temurin-11 \ sh -lc "mvn clean install -DskipTests"
mkdir -p /usr/local/docker-config/wildfly/deployments cp pic-sure-api-war/target/pic-sure-api-war.war /usr/local/docker-config/wildfly/deployments/pic-sure-api-2.war
docker build \ -f docker/all-in-one/all-in-one.Dockerfile \ --build-arg http_proxy=$http_proxy \ --build-arg https_proxy=$http_proxy \ --build-arg no_proxy="$no_proxy" \ --build-arg HTTP_PROXY=$http_proxy \ --build-arg HTTPS_PROXY=$http_proxy \ --build-arg NO_PROXY="$no_proxy" \ --build-arg PIC_SURE_BUILD_VERSION=LATEST \ -t hms-dbmi/pic-sure-wildfly:${pipeline_build_id} .
docker tag hms-dbmi/pic-sure-wildfly:${pipeline_build_id} hms-dbmi/pic-sure-wildfly:LATEST
